name: find_similar_questions
description: Retrieve up to `limit` error questions similar to a given target, using both knowledge-point filtering and pgvector cosine similarity on question content embeddings. Returns a merged, deduplicated list with KP-matched questions prioritized.

errorQuestionId.description: The target ErrorQuestion ID used as the query (excluded from results).

knowledgePointId.description: Knowledge point ID to filter by for the KP-dimension path.

limit.description: Maximum number of similar questions to return (default 5).
